text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After training, I spot an Umamusume<n>with a
troubled look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I always run with force... No, that's<n>not it. I make
sure to have fun... and do<n>my best? That's not it
either...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well... The school newspaper said<n>that they
wanted to write an article on<n>me...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I've always been really bad at<n>those kinda
things. I was just thinking<n>about how I should
respond to their<n>questions.
choice_data_list: Why don't you show them how you train?

Think of it as a chance to work on your
weaknesses.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I see... I wouldn't have to explain<n>anything
verbally then.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I'll try doing just that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right... I shouldn't run away<n>from things
all the time just because<n>I'm bad at them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But I still don't know what to do...
choice_data_list:
Maybe you can prepare some notes 
beforehand?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I'll give it a shot.
